title: Cacophony
description: A (formerly) gambling-themed mod that introduces new additions, endgame items, blocks, and more!
body:
![The mod's new logo.](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/051990db5b8d7491b7bc8b3cc0982a08c881f2dd.png)
# This truly has been, a cacophony..
_Cacophony currently adds a variety of items, most of which are gambling themed, such as _Jokers_ and _Chip vaults_ (NOT CURRENTLY FINDABLE OR CRAFTABLE), but also some other items such as the _Subspace Tripmine.__

## What does this mod add?
The items in this mod are mostly gambling-themed, as stated above; however they aren't used for actual gambling. (obviously)
Currently, the mod contains 7 "Jokers", 2 Misc. cards, 4 Swords, 4 Misc. Items, and 2 helmets that are straight upgrades to netherite.

## Jokers
The main feature of the mod. Most of these give you effects while held in the off-hand, with the exception of the Invisible Joker.
- **Joker**: Strength III while in off-hand.
- **Oops! All 6s**: Luck III while in off-hand.
- **Runner**: Speed III while in off-hand.
- **Rocket**: Jump Boost III while in off-hand.
- **To-do list**: Haste II while in off-hand.
- **Photograph**: Grants a custom effect that briefly stops attacked entities in place while in off-hand.
- **Invisible Joker**: Turns into a non-rare, non-epic item that is held in your off-hand when used in the main hand. (this one has some bugs, they'll be fixed in the next version)

## Misc. Cards
These are the card items that don't classify as jokers.
- **Wheel of fortune**: Grants you a random positive effect for 20 seconds when used.
- **Ace of spades**: Throwable card that ricochets (by a really small amount) off of surfaces, and deals 4 damage to hit entities.

## Swords
These are borrowed from a ROBLOX game called "Sword fights on the heights"
- **Linked Sword**: Basically just a better iron sword, with the fastest swing speed out of all of them; used to craft all the other swords in the mod.
- **Venomshank**: Poisons hit entities, not very useful yet but I'll give it a better use in future versions.
- **Firebrand**: Sets hit entities on fire. (not actually fire aspect, despite it saying that ingame, I just thought it'd be easier to explain that way.)
- **Darkheart**: Inflicts wither on hit entities, upgraded version of the venomshank; also not very useful since it lasts way too little for it to do anything (same reason as venomshank)

## Misc. Non-cards
These are Miscellaneous items that aren't cards.
- **Subspace Tripmine**: Kaboom! craftable with 4 obsidian, 4 gunpowder and 1 amethyst, these things are a surefire way to ruin someone's day.
- **Reflector**: Reflects entities away from you, can be used for movement tech!
- **Magic wand**: As seen in the ROBLOX game Die Of Death, this can be used to repurpose blocks within your inventory. (currently only has interactions with Packed Ice, Copper Block and Noteblock)
- **Banana Launcher**: Also from Die Of Death, this suspiciously grenade-launcher shaped banana launcher shoots bananas that your foes may slip on!

## Helmets
Straight upgrades to netherite helmets, however they have the same durability and protection.
- **Gambler's Hat**: Grants you luck IV while worn, pretty simple.
- **Plague Mask**: Grants you immunity to wither and poison while worn.

# CURRENTLY IN ALPHA!
Alot of this mod's aspects may change or be removed during development, and **this is not representative of the final product** at all.
May include unfinished or unpolished features.
